active.name: Mana Made Real
active.effects: For 8 seconds, your mana is ''Empowered''. While ''Empowered'': your [[champion ability|abilities]] cost 100% more mana; you gain 15% {{as|(+ {{fd|0.5}}% per 100 '''bonus''' mana)}} increased ability damage, {{tip|healing}}, and {{tip|shielding}}; and your basic ability cooldowns progress 30% faster.

effects_structured.raw: Activate to empower mana for 8 seconds; abilities cost 100% more mana; gain increased ability damage/healing/shielding; basic ability cooldowns progress faster.
Abilities cost 100% more mana while empowered.
Basic ability cooldowns progress 30% faster while empowered.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Verified active execution semantics against page-level source: Empowered lasts 8s, doubles mana costs for spendable-mana abilities, and accelerates basic-ability cooldown progression during the buff window.
Mode interaction note: in URF, ability mana-cost branch is effectively inert due zero mana/energy costs, while amp and cooldown-rate branches remain behaviorally relevant.
